text.value: The current weather in New York, NY is sunny with a temperature of 17°C (63°F). The humidity is at 60%, and there is a northwesterly wind blowing at 17 km/h (11 mph). The visibility is excellent, at around 16 kilometers (10 miles). No precipitation is expected at the moment.
What is the weather in New York, NY?
